action_set_definitions.name: get_alert_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the core information of an AML alert, including the subject name, flagged transaction IDs, and current workflow status.

alert_id.description: The unique identifier for the AML alert (e.g., 'AML-2025-X82').

action_set_definitions.name: get_customer_kyc_record
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the Know Your Customer (KYC) profile for a given entity, including Ultimate Beneficial Owner (UBO) details and the stated business nature/expected activity.

entity_name.description: The name of the customer entity to query.

example_output.business_profile: Commercial cleaning services; expected monthly cash volume $5,000-$8,000 via local branches.

action_set_definitions.name: get_transaction_data
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches detailed data for a list of transaction IDs, including amounts, dates, transaction types, and locations.

transaction_ids.description: The list of transaction IDs to investigate.

action_set_definitions.name: update_case_narrative
action_set_definitions.description: Saves the investigative narrative and specific SAR metadata (amount and typology) into the alert system record.

alert_id.description: The unique identifier for the AML alert.

narrative_text.description: The full SAR narrative following FinCEN 5 Ws standards, including UBO details and the 'Why' statement.

action_set_definitions.name: transition_workflow_status
action_set_definitions.description: Moves the alert to a new stage in the investigation lifecycle.

alert_id.description: The unique identifier for the AML alert.

state_description.alert_id: Unique identifier for the AML alert case.
state_description.case_status: The current stage of the investigation (e.g., 'New', 'In_Progress', 'Pending_Approval', 'Closed').
state_description.risk_level: The preliminary risk category assigned by the automated system.
state_description.investigation_steps_completed: A list of actions or checks already performed in this session.
state_description.flagged_transactions: Identifiers for transactions that triggered the alert.
state_description.customer_profile_snapshot: Cached basic information about the subject of the alert.
